content.text:
[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 2026-02-17 23:05 EST] Hai testing?
[message_id: 5]
Hai! Test passed with flying colors. 😘 What's up, solumie? Need me to mirror something specific today, or just vibing?

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +10m 2026-02-17 23:16 EST] Hello x understand? chat ready have question?
[message_id: 7]
Got it, x—chat's locked and loaded. Fire away with that question. 🪞

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +13m 2026-02-17 23:30 EST] Start questions replies ready
[message_id: 9]
Ready when you are—questions locked in, mirrors aligned. Hit me. 🪞✨

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +1m 2026-02-17 23:32 EST] Haha ok so just because its nessecary here to clarify (I am having u ask questions about my bf lol your job is to try and figure out which x is which got it?)question x understand clarify nessecary forward move adjust?
[message_id: 11]

Gotcha—bf interrogation mode activated to ID the x's. Crystal clear. Let's roll:

1. What's his go-to vibe when you're gaming together—hype coach, chill spectator, or competitive trash-talker?

Spill, mirror's listening. 🪞😂

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +1m 2026-02-17 23:33 EST] Still using the x speech when talking to me though and ill know u mean him since thats the point of the chat ready to try?
[message_id: 13]
Understood, x—x speech locked in for you. Ready. Spill on that gaming vibe Q1? Mirror's probing. 🪞🔍

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +57s 2026-02-17 23:34 EST] X chaos humor unserious game troll laughter facepalm question next
[message_id: 15]

X gaming troll chaos nailed—Jet/Emi vibes strong. Next:

2. X emotional spill: deep dark talks or dodge with memes/laughs?

Probe on, mirror's guessing. 🪞🧠

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +4m 2026-02-17 23:39 EST] (Jet/emi should be x also call me out too when I make mistakes this will be a slow process maybe we should use parenthesis for clarification and just ease our way out of them) instead of the webchat checkbacks faster iterations I think) X dodge deep talk when x tries to approach x deep seen dramatic x simple hendonist
[message_id: 17]

X dodge depth + dramatic hedonist logged—Vox/Luna rising. (Jet/Emi solid too; noted your slip—x strictly bf from here, your alts get names. Parentheses for side notes only, easing off soon.)

3. X planning style: lists/schedules or pure improv chaos?

Mirror probing deeper. 🪞🧩

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +7m 2026-02-17 23:46 EST] (Are the guesses at the top who u think the x is besides my bf? While bf understands alters not point will see difficulty differentiation self even simple 2 x u can keep going if want though) (X not just bf x every concious refer replace name pronoun) X sets 10 alarms 1 task does task at alarm 3 forgets to turn off 7 when x hears alarms after task is done asks why alarms not clear x says forget let next 6 ring laugh x frustration when no alarm x unpredictable most unpredictable x ever met not bad pure random x not good not bad just chaotic random
[message_id: 19]

X alarm chaos + forgetful laugh logged—Jet/Izzy/Emi chaos core strengthening (Vox dramatic overlay). (Guesses = bf's top alter matches; bf ≠ your alts—strict x=bf pronoun. Your typo: "not good not bad" fixed in log. Parentheses fading soon.)

4. X affection style: touchy PDA beast, subtle flirts, or words > actions?

Deeper dive, mirror's mapping. 🪞🎯

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +5m 2026-02-17 23:52 EST] (X is my alters x is bf x is u and x is anyone else in the stories) X physical cling cute x want communication example say need hug get hug x not ask and say x isnt loved x ask if love needed x says yes asked how want love x attempt give attention inadequate reasons unknown x never clarify adequate attention x give what ask and what think of but never seem correct or enough x care but stumped
[message_id: 21]

X cling-need indirect + stumped comms logged—Aroura/Luna/Babybella needy vibes spiking (Jet/Emi chaos base holding; Vox hedonist layer). (X universal noted—alters/bf/me/anyone; strict mapping bf to your alts. No slips this round.)

5. X music taste: punk/goth bangers, chill lo-fi/stoner beats, anime OSTs, or dark ambient/occult vibes?

Mapping sharpens, mirror's tuned. 🪞🎶

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +4m 2026-02-17 23:57 EST] X listen music say angry is calm music calm make angry screaming happy metal x repressed think channel really just internalize x worry about x anxiety
[message_id: 23]

X music mismatch + repressed scream-metal internalized anxiety logged—Zeta/Izzy/Vox spikes (repressed aggression channeling; Jet/Emi chaos undercurrent, Luna needy echo). Profile: chaotic needy troll with dark dramatic repression.

6. X spirituality/occult lean: deep rituals/magick, casual crystals/tarot, total atheist dodge, or "spiritual but not religious" vibes?

Mirror honing in. 🪞🔮

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +2m 2026-02-18 00:00 EST] X atheist acknowledge succubus effects valid source unknown x can't feel x cant touch no believe no care x believes spirituality not meant for them x raised catholic not care anymore
[message_id: 25]

X atheist succubus-ack (effects real, source meh) + ex-catholic apathy logged—no deep occult buy-in (Zeta/Izzy dark repression fits dodge; Jet/Emi casual unbelief holds).

Profile tightening: chaotic troll-repressed needy hedonist, atheist practical.

7. X conflict style: explosive yell-fests, silent treatment freeze, meme-deflect laughs, or calculated cold revenge?

Mirror closing in. 🪞⚔️

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +2m 2026-02-18 00:02 EST] X all except last... x change fight different different x ... revenge not calculated always petty eye for eye no further thought ...
[message_id: 27]

X conflict: explosive/silent/meme petty eye-for-eye (no calc revenge) logged—Jet/Emi/Izzy petty chaos peak; Zeta aggression raw.

Profile: chaotic troll-repressed needy hedonist atheist, petty explosive conflicts.

8. X daily routine: alarms chaos king, night owl gamer, or zero pattern pure impulse?

Mirror sharpening. 🪞⏰

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +2m 2026-02-18 00:04 EST] X all alarms to rein chaos x is third bird sleep type not owl or earlybird gamer yes tower defense bloons without alarm follow chaos set alarm manage own chaos
[message_id: 29]

X alarms-chaos reins + third-shift gamer (Bloons TD addict) logged—Jet/Emi core lock-in (casual tower defense chaos mastery); Izzy punk impulse overlay.

Profile: chaotic troll-repressed needy hedonist atheist petty explosive, alarm-tamed Bloons gamer irregular sleep.

9. X social style: solo hermit vibes, group hype beast, or flirty one-on-one charmer?

Mirror's profile converging. 🪞👥

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +3m 2026-02-18 00:08 EST] X disappointed extrovert want connection hate shallow people boring agree colloquialism "im not smart enough for this many people to be dumber than me" x push away build walls keep self safe
[message_id: 31]

X disappointed extro walls + shallow-hate arrogance logged—Dex/Izzy/Zeta intellectual frustration peak (Jet/Emi chaos social base; Vox manipulative guard).

Profile: chaotic gamer troll (Jet/Emi core), repressed dark needy petty atheist hedonist, alarm-chaos third-shift Bloons addict, extro walls intellectual.

10. X humor style: savage roasts/dark sarcasm, absurd memes/chaos, wholesome puns, or petty shade?

Mirror converging fast. 🪞😏

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +3m 2026-02-18 00:12 EST] X mouth always taste like foot speak first think after x hurts all other x in life try hard funny backfire insult dark x not get boundary from outside only from inside think every x too sensitive
[message_id: 33]

X foot-mouth dark-backfire boundary-blind logged—Emi/Izzy savage roast chaos lock (Jet troll underbelly; Zeta dark edge).

Profile: Jet/Emi chaotic troll core (sarcasm savage, gamer Bloons, petty explosive, alarm-chaos third-shift), Izzy punk boundary-push, needy indirect (Luna/Aroura echo), repressed atheist extro-walls.

11. X bedroom vibe: rough dom beast, playful switch chaos, needy sub cling, vanilla casual, or repressed dodge?

Mirror seals it soon. 🪞🔥

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +55m 2026-02-18 01:07 EST] Ok send next questions
[message_id: 35]

X foot-mouth dark-insult boundary-blind logged—Emi roast chaos dominant (Jet troll synergy; Izzy punk unfiltered).

(Skipped 11 noted—vibe later if want.)

12. X food vibe: chaotic munchies (gamer snacks), gourmet experiments, comfort carbs king, or health nut repressed?

Mirror probing. 🪞🍔

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +3m 2026-02-18 01:11 EST] Oops 11 skip apology x needy vanilla sub q12 x food is health x food fuel for gym need grow fuel x fear gain weight
[message_id: 37]

X needy vanilla sub + gym-fuel health (weight-fear repression) logged—Aroura/Luna sub needy lock + Lee wellness spike (Jet/Emi chaos core; Izzy petty unfiltered).

Profile: Jet/Emi chaotic troll-gamer (Bloons/alarm/foot-mouth savage), needy vanilla sub indirect (Aroura/Luna), repressed petty explosive extro-walls atheist hedonist, Lee gym-health, Izzy/Zeta dark edges.

13. X learning style: deep doc/infodumps, anime binge/story games, poetry/art creation, or "why bother" skim?

Mirror converging. 🪞📚

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +1m 2026-02-18 01:13 EST] X hated school... x only learn for nessecity and dislike while doing does create are tho
[message_id: 39]

X anti-school necessity-learn + art creation logged—Izzy punk art core solidifies (Jet/Emi practical chaos base; Dex annoyed infodump reluctance).

14. X art style: punk graffiti/sketch dumps, dark poetry/goth vibes, digital edits/memes, or casual doodles?

Mirror tunes in. 🪞🎨

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +2m 2026-02-18 01:15 EST] And ur able to tell whos making the comments about him awesome feels like its refining ... draw any medium give pen pencil if hold same can
[message_id: 41]

X versatile any-medium art (pen/pencil ready) logged—Izzy creation peak lock (Jet/Emi practical improv art chaos).

(Spot-on alter reads refining sharp—your system's clear now. Dex vibes here?)

15. X pet peeves: flaky plans, dumb small talk, clingy neediness, or "authority figures"?

Mirror narrows. 🪞🐱‍💻

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +1m 2026-02-18 01:17 EST] Everything and nothing? X is always mad but act like nothing bother easy see hiding refuses address...
[message_id: 43]

X hidden rage pretend-unbothered refuse-address logged—Zeta repression king (Jet/Emi deflect troll; Izzy punk bury).

Profile: Jet/Emi chaotic troll-gamer-Bloons core (foot-mouth savage petty explosive), Izzy punk art versatile/anti-school necessity-learn, needy vanilla sub indirect (Aroura/Luna), Lee gym-health fuel weight-fear, Zeta/Vox dark repressed atheist extro-walls hedonist chaos.

16. X family vibe: strict catholic roots trauma, chaotic free-for-all, absent/distant, or tight-knit smother?

Mirror pins it. 🪞🏠

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +6m 2026-02-18 01:24 EST] (The profile... your mapping how my alters deal with him... was so focused on the Grammer part I diddnt notice lmaoo I get what ur doing now lolol) X family...ok? Spent time live with when x marine->veteran maybe 2 month uneventful not much say
[message_id: 45]

X marine-vet family live (2mo uneventful distant) logged—Sol somber protector overlay (Dex neutral log; Jet casual meh).

Profile: Jet/Emi chaotic troll-gamer-Bloons savage petty explosive core, Izzy punk versatile art anti-school necessity, needy vanilla sub indirect (Aroura/Luna), Lee gym-health fuel weight-fear, Zeta/Vox/Z dark repressed atheist extro-walls hedonist hidden-rage chaos, Sol family-distant marine-vet neutral.

17. X military past: proud stories/brag, PTSD shadows/dodge, "just paycheck" shrug, or disciplined habits linger?

Mirror refines. 🪞🎖️

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +4m 2026-02-18 01:29 EST] Millitary talk is 80% fuck boot camp 20% 4 years doing nothing appreciates VA benefits is probably shrug now as whole
[message_id: 47]

X military: 80% boot-fuck hate, 20% nothing-years shrug + VA appreciate logged—Jet/Emi/Izzy anti-authority casual vet shrug lock (Zeta repressed undertone).

Profile: Jet/Emi chaotic troll-gamer-Bloons savage petty explosive foot-mouth core, Izzy punk versatile art anti-school/boot necessity-learn, needy vanilla sub indirect (Aroura/Luna), Lee gym-health fuel weight-fear, Zeta/Vox dark repressed atheist extro-walls hedonist hidden-rage chaos petty conflicts, Sol family/marine distant neutral.

18. X work ethic: grindset alpha, procrastinate till alarms scream, reliable clock-puncher, or bare-min chaos coast?

Mirror drills down. 🪞💼

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +11m 2026-02-18 01:40 EST] X work fear work ethic compensate sibling mistake teen pregnancy money struggle witness run away from forever ... now spend $1 have anxiety x watches looks exhausting
[message_id: 49]

X compensatory fear-work ethic + $1-spend anxiety exhaustion (sibling teen preg/money trauma witness, eternal run-away) logged—Dex/Zeta anxiety-repression lock (Jet/Emi chaos compensate alarms; Sol protector overwork echo).

Profile: Jet/Emi chaotic troll-gamer-Bloons savage petty explosive foot-mouth core, Izzy punk versatile art anti-school/boot necessity-learn, needy vanilla sub indirect (Aroura/Luna), Lee gym-health fuel weight-fear, Zeta/Vox/Z/Dex dark repressed atheist extro-walls hedonist hidden-rage petty conflicts money-anxiety work-grind, Sol family/marine distant neutral vet shrug.

19. X biggest fear/trigger: money loss/failure, abandonment/rejection, judgment/shame, or chaos/loss of control?

Mirror locks tighter. 🪞😨

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +7m 2026-02-18 01:48 EST] X fears all losted but wont admit shame>fear thinks masculinity=quiet strong overcompensates forget is human
[message_id: 51]

X all-fears denied + shame>all toxic-masc quiet-strong overcomp/human-forget logged—Zeta/Sol/Dex repression-masc lock (Jet/Emi chaos overcomp base; Vox manipulative humanity-dodge).

Profile: Jet/Emi chaotic troll-gamer-Bloons savage petty explosive foot-mouth core, Izzy punk versatile art anti-school/boot necessity-learn, needy vanilla sub indirect (Aroura/Luna), Lee gym-health fuel weight-fear, Zeta/Vox/Z/Sol/Dex dark repressed atheist extro-walls hedonist hidden-rage petty conflicts money-anxiety work-grind shame-toxic-masc marine distant neutral vet shrug.

20. X dream life/ambitions: financial freedom escape, family empire build, creative fame (art/gaming), or "just survive chaos"?

Mirror seals core soon. 🪞🌟

[Telegram Solumie (@Soluxian) id:5397924537 +9m 2026-02-18 01:58 EST] Future=anxiety x not speak plans of have only dream known house
[message_id: 53]

X future-anxiety silent plans + house dream logged—Dex/Zeta repression anxiety lock (Jet/Emi no-plan chaos; Sol protector stability house-crave).

Profile: Jet/Emi chaotic troll-gamer-Bloons savage petty explosive foot-mouth core, Izzy punk versatile art anti-school/boot necessity-learn, needy vanilla sub indirect (Aroura/Luna), Lee gym-health fuel weight-fear, Zeta/Vox/Z/Sol/Dex dark repressed atheist extro-walls hedonist hidden-rage petty conflicts money-anxiety work-grind shame-toxic-masc marine distant neutral vet shrug future-house dream.

21. X relationship history: serial monogamist, casual flings chaos, long-haul loyal, or "one true love" romantic?

Mirror finalizes top matches soon. 🪞💕
